dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I thought I was managing. I thought the worst was over. I was wrong.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: His old business partner came demanding payment on a debt I didn't know existed. {target_npc} tried to mediate, but the partner threatens to take our home. {quest_focus} is hard enough without fighting for a roof. The only way to gather enough {quest_item} is from the old supply cache {location_hint}, but {enemy_type} have taken over since the route went unused. {quest_stakes} just got worse.
dialogueChunks.outro: Grief wasn't enough, apparently. {quest_threat} surrounds me on all sides now.

playerResponses.text: Nobody's taking your home. I'll get what you need.
Debt collectors circling a widow. Charming. I'll handle it.
Financial disputes aren't something I can solve with a sword.

dialogueChunks.intro: The garden is growing again, {player_name}. But something is trying to destroy it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat} raided the outskirts again. They trampled {quest_focus} two nights ago: not for food, just destruction. {target_npc} set up a watch, but we're short-handed. I need more {quest_item} to rebuild the beds and fencing from {location_hint}. And someone needs to deal with the {enemy_type} nest before they destroy everything we've replanted.
dialogueChunks.outro: I won't let them take this from me too. She grew this garden from bare dirt, and {quest_stakes}.

playerResponses.text: They won't touch that garden again. I'll find their nest.
Defending a garden from monsters. Strange work, but meaningful.
The garden isn't worth getting killed over.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I found something in his pack that changes everything.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Hidden in a false bottom was a letter. He knew {quest_threat} was real. He'd been warned about the {enemy_type} and went anyway because {quest_stakes}. He wrote, 'If something happens to me, make sure the {quest_item} gets through.' {target_npc} read the letter and hasn't stopped crying. The settlement he was trying to reach is in worse shape than ever. {quest_focus} has to be finished.
dialogueChunks.outro: He knew the risk and chose to go anyway. {quest_action} is the least we can do.

playerResponses.text: He was braver than he knew. I'll make sure his sacrifice counts.
A man who walked into danger for strangers deserves to have his mission completed.
Honoring the dead by risking the living. I understand, but I can't.
